creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  - Add support for clamav
  - Fix ldap support
  
  PR:             ports/115752, ports/115867

                  Thomas Vogt <thomas@bsdunix.ch> (ports/115867)
  Approved by:    sat (mantor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
